verses.text: A pa tawlkhat a ten'na Kanaan gamah Jakob teng hi

Jakob innkuante' tangthu hih bang ahi hi. Josef kum sawmlesagih pha ahih manin a sanggamte tawh tuuhon cing hi. A pa' zite Bilhah leh Zilpah' tapate tawh tangval ahi uh hi. Josef in a pa uh kiangah amaute' siat gamtatnate a gen hi
Tu-in Israel in a ta dangte khat peuhpeuh sangin Josef itzaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a teek khitin a neih a tapa ahi hi. Amah in ama-a' dingin puantualpi bansau khat a bawlsak hi
Ahih hangin a pa un a sanggamte khempeuh sangin amah a itzawkna a sanggamte in a muh uh ciangin, amaute in Josef mudah uh a, nuamtakin amah hopih theilo uh hi
Tu-in Josef in mang khat man a, amah in a sanggamte' lakah a gen ciangin amaute in amah muhdah semsemna-in nei uh hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Keima mat hih mang ngai un
Eite in lo lai-ah buhlom i hen a, keima buhlom tho-in ding tang hi. Tua kiimah note' buhlom kikhawm a, keima buhlom mai-ah kun uh hi,” a ci hi

A sanggamte in ama kiangah, “Kote' tungah nang in hong uk ding a, kote' tungah ukna aana nei ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a mangte leh a thugente' hangin amah mudah semsem uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in mang dang khat man a, tua mang a sanggamte kiangah genin, “Mang dang khat ka man hi. Ni, kha, leh aksi sawmlekhatte kei' mai-ah hong kun uh hi,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin amah in a pa leh a sanggamte' kiangah a gen ciangin a pa in amah taii-in, “Nangma mat hih mang a bangci mang ahi hiam? Kei leh na nu leh na sanggamte, nangma mai leilakah a kun dingin hong pai ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
A sanggamte in amah haza uh a, ahih hangin a pa in hih thute a ciamteh hi.
Khatvei a pa uh' tuuhonte a cing dingin Shekhem gei-ah a sanggamte a pai hi
Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na sanggamte in Shekhem-ah tuuhon cing uh hilo ahi hiam? Hong pai in, amau' kiangah hong sawl ning,” a ci hi. Amah in a kiangah, “Hiah om ing,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Tu-in va pai in la, na sanggamte leh tuuhonte a cidam hiam va thei in la, kei kiangah thu hong zasak kik in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Hebron kuam panin Josef sawl a, Shekhem-ah amah va tung hi
Gamlakah a vak kawikawina mi khat in mu a, “Bang zongzong na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
“Ka sanggamte a zong ka hi hi. Amaute in koi lai-ah tuuhon cing uh hiam, hong gen in, hong thum ing,” amah in ci hi
Mipa in, “Amaute paikhia zo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Dothan-ah pai ni,’ a cih uh ka za hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a sanggamte' nungah Josef pai a, Dothan-ah amaute a mu hi
Amaute in gamlapi-ah amah na mu uh a, amaute' nai-ah amah hong tun' ma-in amaute in amah thah ding na vaihawm uh hi
Amaute khatlekhat in, “Hih lai-ah mangmanpa hong pai hi
Tu-in hong pai un. Amah thatin dum sung khatah lawn ni. Tua ciangin gamsa khat in amah netum khin hi, i ci ding hi. A mangte bang a suak hiam i mu ding hi,” a kici uh hi
Ahih hangin Reuben in tua thu a zak ciangin, “Amah that kei ni,” ci-in, amau' khutsung panin amah honkhia hi

A pa' kiang a tun'pihkik theihna dingin amau' khutsung pan a hotkhiat theihna dingin Reuben in amaute' kiangah, “Amah that kei un. Hih gamlak dum sungah amah lawn un. Ahih hangin amah bangmah cih kei un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin, a sanggamte' kiangah Josef hong tun' ciangin, ama silh lai a puantualpi bansau a hawkkhiatsak uh hi
Amaute in Josef la-in dum sung khatah a lawn uh hi. A dum pen a hawm hi a, a sungah tui omlo hi
Tua ciangin amaute an ne dingin tu uh hi. A khuadak uh leh Gilead panin Ishmael mite a kalaohte uh tawh singnai, lingsi, leh myrrh paknamtui pua-in Egypt-ah puaksuk dingin a pai mu uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah in a sanggamte kiangah, “I sanggampa thatin amah i thahna im lehang bang metna om ahi hiam
Hong pai un, Ishmael mite kiangah amah zuak ni. Amah bangmah cih kei ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah i sanggampa, eima cilesa ahi hi,” a ci hi. A sanggamte in ama thu mang hi

Tua ciangin Midian mi sumbawlte in hong nawk hi. Amaute in Josef kai to-in dum sung panin domkhia to uh a, Ishmael mite tungah ngun shekel sawmnihin amah zuak uh a, amaute in Egypt-ah Josef a paipih uh hi
Reuben dumah paikikin dum sungah Josef a omlohna a muh ciangin amah in a puan balkek a
a sanggamte kiangah ciahkikin, “Tangvalpa om nawnlo hi. Kei bangci ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Josef' puan la-in, keel khat go uh a, a sisan sungah a puan diah uh hi
Amaute in a puantualpi bansau a pa uh kiangah puak uh a, “Hih puan ka mu uh hi. Na tapa' puan hi hiam, hilo hiam tu-in thei in,” a ci uh hi
Amah in Josef' puan ahihlam thei a, “Ka tapa' puan ahi hi. Gamsa khatpeuh in amah netum khinzo hi ding hi. Josef kibalnen gawp ahihna uplohna ding omlo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jakob in ama puan balkekin, a kawngah puanhampi teng a, a tapa' hangin ni tampi sung a kap hi
A tapate leh a tanute khempeuh in amah hehnem uh a, ahih hangin amah hehnep zawhin omlo a, “Hilo hi. A kapsa-in ka tapa kiang Leinuai-ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin ama hangin a pa kap hi
Tua kikal sungin Midian mite in Egypt gam sunga inncing mang, Faro' nuai-ah ulian ahi Potifar' tungah Josef na zuak uh hi.
